groupings.title: HR Operations
groupings.description: Core HR operations, HR systems, compliance, payroll, documentation, and employee lifecycle administration.

groupings.title: Employee Relations
groupings.description: Employee relations, labor relations, investigations, conflict resolution, and workplace compliance.

groupings.title: People Strategy
groupings.description: Strategic HR, HR business partnering, organization design, workforce planning, and culture transformation.

groupings.title: Talent Management
groupings.description: Leadership, succession, career architecture, skills, learning, and talent development.

groupings.title: People Analytics
groupings.description: HR analytics, workforce metrics, dashboards, and strategic HR reporting.

groupings.title: Talent Acquisition
groupings.description: Recruiting, interviewing, employer branding, job descriptions, and candidate experience.

groupings.title: Employee Experience
groupings.description: Employee experience, engagement, wellbeing, performance, rewards, and inclusion.

groupings.title: Technical Recruiting
groupings.description: Hiring guides for AI, software engineering, infrastructure, security, QA, data, and product design roles.

groupings.title: Regional
groupings.description: Country-specific HR regulations, employment law, and workplace practices.
